name: Aisha
text: Selkie. Mira warned me you would call pursuit a rescue.

name: Selkie
text: Did she also tell you I learned to ask what Moon wants?

name: Aisha
text: She said you were learning. My blade is less forgiving than my sister.

name: Aisha
text: Order would make Moon yours. Chaos would leave her alone. What do you choose?

name: Selkie
text: To stay close enough to hear her choose.
